name: Weekly GitHub Report → AI Summary → Email
description: Every Monday morning, analyzes a GitHub repository's recent activity, generates an executive summary using an LLM, and sends it via Gmail.

config.SYSTEM_PROMPT: You are a technical writer. Summarize the repository activity for a non-technical audience in 3-5 bullet points.

replacements.config_delta: Replace TO+SUBJECT+BODY with CHANNEL (e.g. '#weekly-reports'). Required secret: slack/bot_token instead of google/gmail_oauth_token. Better for team-wide visibility where the report is discussed inline.
Replace TO+SUBJECT+BODY with WEBHOOK_URL_SECRET='teams/webhook_url'. Set TITLE='Weekly Engineering Report'. Required secret: teams/webhook_url instead of google/gmail_oauth_token.
